title: Magical Takoyaki Bites
description: A twist on the classic Japanese street food, infused with a hint of magic.

ingredients.name: Magical lemongrass oil
ingredients.notes: Add a pinch of magic to your dish

ingredients.name: Lemongrass
ingredients.notes: Use the white and light green parts

ingredients.name: Japanese pickled ginger
ingredients.notes: Thinly sliced and pickled in vinegar

instructions: Heat the Magical lemongrass oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the Takoyaki batter mix and stir until combined.
Transfer the mixture to a Takoyaki pan or a non-stick skillet.
Drop small amounts of the mixture into the pan, filling it about 2/3 full.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the edges start to set.
Use a skewer to loosen the edges and flip the Takoyaki bites.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until golden brown.
Serve with a dollop of mild mayonnaise, a sprinkle of Japanese pickled ginger, and a pinch of sesame seeds.
Garnish with a sprig of fresh lemongrass, if desired.
